title: Process for Validating a Stochastic Time Series Model
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative diagnostic process of checking whether a fitted stochastic model adequately describes a time series.
relationships: Process starts with a Fitted Model, from which Residuals are calculated; Residuals are analyzed with Statistical Tests; Test results determine if the Residuals are White Noise (Model Adequate) or not (Model Inadequate); if inadequate, the process loops back to revise the Fitted Model
